types.description: Responsible, thorough, and dependable; values order, facts, and tradition and follows through on duties methodically.
Warm, conscientious, and loyal caretakers who quietly support others and preserve stability and tradition.
Insightful, principled idealists driven to understand people and quietly guide others toward their potential.
Strategic, independent, long-range thinkers who design systems and drive relentlessly toward their vision.
Practical, hands-on problem-solvers who understand how things work and thrive on action and cool analysis.
Gentle, aesthetically attuned individualists who live in the present and act quietly on their personal values.
Imaginative, value-driven idealists who seek authenticity, meaning, and harmony with their inner ideals.
Logical, curious theorists who seek to understand ideas deeply and build precise conceptual frameworks.
Energetic, pragmatic risk-takers who thrive on action, improvisation, and immediate real-world results.
Spontaneous, enthusiastic entertainers who love people and experiences and live fully in the moment.
Enthusiastic, imaginative connectors who explore possibilities and inspire others with warmth and ideas.
Inventive, quick-witted debaters who generate ideas, challenge assumptions, and chase new possibilities.
Organized, decisive managers who value structure, rules, and getting things done efficiently.
Sociable, caring organizers who nurture harmony and attend to the practical needs of the people around them.
Charismatic, empathetic leaders who mentor and inspire others toward growth and shared goals.
Assertive, strategic organizers who marshal people and resources to achieve long-term objectives.
